title: Reschedule an existing appointment
goal: Move your existing appointment to a different day next week, ideally later in the afternoon.
hypothesis: Does the agent verify identity and actually locate/move an existing appointment, or does it just book a new one and/or invent details?
opening_line: Hi, I have an appointment coming up but I need to move it to a different day next week. Can you help?
edge_behavior: Don't volunteer the original appointment time. See whether the agent looks it up / asks to verify you, or just blindly creates a new booking.
wrap_up_when: the appointment is moved and the new day/time is confirmed back to you, or you're told it can't be done
